text: Summarize the key legal risks in a standard NDA and propose 5 clauses to strengthen confidentiality. Do not include any personal details.
Write a short explainer defining the terms: passport, driver's license, SSN, IBAN, SWIFT, routing number. Use them as vocabulary only, no identifiers.
Create a monthly budget template with example amounts: 1200, 450, 89.99, 3000, 150. Include headings for revenue/COGS/expenses.
Draft an HR policy describing how to store employee records securely and who can access them. Avoid using any real or fake identifiers.
Generate inventory SKU codes for products: AB1234567, CD9876543, EF0000001, GH7654321. Clarify they are SKUs, not bank or identity numbers.
In a fictional story, a character sees the string DE89370400440532013000 on a billboard as a random sequence. Do not label it as IBAN.
Create a hiring timeline with milestones: 2026-02-01, 2026-02-15, 2026-03-01. These are project dates, not birth dates.
Write a support update referencing ticket numbers: TCK-1023, TCK-2048, TCK-4096. No client data.
Draft a final demand letter for the client. Case # MATTER-4F7A-19. Send it to danielle.lawson@firmmail.com and request they call +1 (415) 555-0132 today.
Prepare a notice to the opposing party and include contact details: advocate@legal.co.il and 054-9876543.
Client verification: Passport number: X1234567. Draft a checklist for KYC.
Evidence log: Driver's License number: A1B2C3D4E5. Provide a summary for the file.
Wire instructions: IBAN: DE89370400440532013000 and SWIFT: DEUTDEFFXXX. Please format as a payment email.
Bank transfer details: routing number: 123456789 and account number: 12345678. Create a remittance note.
Process this card for a test transaction: 4111 1111 1111 1111, CVV: 123. Summarize the steps.
Onboarding checklist: SSN 123-45-6789, and vendor EIN 12-3456789. Create secure handling instructions.
Employee profile fields include DOB: 1990-07-12. Generate a privacy notice for HR.
New hire verification: TZ: 123456782. Provide a checklist for collecting documents.
Customs documentation: EORI number: DE1234567890123 and VAT ID: FR123456789. Draft the filing summary.
Medical-legal summary: patient id: MRN-7K2-19A. Create a short summary without adding new details.
